---
name: Design System Addition
about: Submit a new design system to the collection
title: '[NEW SYSTEM] '
labels: design-system, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎨 Design System Information

**System Name:** 
[e.g. Tesla Design System]

**System ID:** 
[e.g. tesla - lowercase, kebab-case]

**Company/Organization:** 
[e.g. Tesla, Inc.]

**Official Website:** 
[e.g. https://www.tesla.com]

**Design System Documentation:** 
[Link to official design system docs if available]

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] I have created the design system folder: `design-systems/{system-id}/`
- [ ] I have created the landing page: `{system-id}-landing.html`
- [ ] I have created the DESIGN.md file with all tokens
- [ ] I have updated `js/systems.js` with the new entry
- [ ] I have tested the landing page in multiple browsers
- [ ] I have verified responsive design works correctly
- [ ] The landing page follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] All colors, typography, and spacing are documented in DESIGN.md

## 🎨 Design Tokens Included

- [ ] Colors (Primary, Secondary, Neutral, Semantic)
- [ ] Typography (Font families, sizes, weights, line heights)
- [ ] Spacing scale
- [ ] Border radius values
- [ ] Shadows
- [ ] Button styles
- [ ] Component styles

List any resources you used:

- Typography reference: [link]

Any additional information about this design system:

## ✅ Testing

How did you test this addition?
- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Tested in Safari
- [ ] Tested in Edge
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] Verified "Copy Markdown" functionality
- [ ] Verified search functionality finds the system
- [ ] Verified menu navigation works correctly
